steps.title: Meet Up
steps.text: Hello explorer, thanks for coming with us today. There are currently some sightings of a wolf, you see on your device there is a scan distance and bearings. Distance tells us how far away you are from the designated point while bearings tells you if you are facing the right direction. Firstly lets meet up, use that tool and meet us within 40 meter of that spot

steps.title: Track the Scent
steps.text: Good, we will need you to track down the wolf scent, one of our hunters has placed a transmitter on it. Get within 40 meter of it

steps.title: Break Contact
steps.text: ....static, you hear a lot of static, is the radio being jammed? Leave the area and get 50 meter away
